claim_boundary: D024-C interprets D023-C only; no new experiment, refit, threshold application, locked-data access, mission-loop work, Gate 5 reinterpretation, QML invention claim, quantum-advantage claim, or Gate 6 authority follows.
core_result: D023-C found a future-useful recall signal, but it is post-D017-informed development evidence only.
next_recommended_step: Close the CSAFE-RF branch into manuscript discussion and reserve any real-data continuation for a new future protocol with prospective recall, calibration, and locked-data rules.
primary_scientific_lesson: A safety objective that prioritizes missed unsafe cases can select a different model than Brier-first scoring, but this must be frozen prospectively before any locked-data use.
qml_lesson: The available QML-style A02 exact-RBF feasibility candidate did not dominate the selected logistic head under recall-first CSAFE-RF, so QML remains appendix/future-work evidence rather than an advancing result.
